mapper.select: SELECT /* /appform/mspSmsTemplateMst : McpCommonMapper.selectMspSmsTemplateMst */ TEMPLATE_ID , TEMPLATE_NM , TEMPLATE_DSC , MGMT_ORGN_ID , MSG_TYPE , CALLBACK , TEXT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM , EXPIRE_HOUR , SUBJECT , WORK_TYPE , RETRY , K_TEMPLATE_CODE FROM MSP_SMS_TEMPLATE_MST WHERE TEMPLATE_ID = #{templateId}
